reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (CoT) skill will improve my reasoning and accuracy for all future questions. Since I already have 1 SP, it's a worthwhile investment before proceeding to the next challenge.

I have 1 SP available and am 1 XP away from earning another. Unlocking pe_plan (Plan+Reflect) will provide a structured approach and a reflection step, which is vital for maintaining high HP and ensuring correct answers in higher-level doors later.

Unlocking the reflection skill provides a dedicated self-correction step, which is vital for maintaining HP and ensuring accuracy on higher-level questions. This will be more valuable in the long run than any single door choice.
